title: More Than A Foxbox
description: (Mob Plushies) Much more than just a fox in a box! More Than A Foxbox features familiar friends with configurable poses and noises.
body:
Much more than just a fox in a box! More Than A Foxbox features familiar friends with configurable poses and noises.
--- More Than A Foxbox, the successor to [foxbox](https://modrinth.com/mod/foxbox), is a data-driven plushie mod, giving users the ability to create custom plushies. It also provides built-in plushies, such as - Red Fox - Snow Fox - Cow variants - Wolf variants - Creeper Plushies are crafted using the new Sewing Table block, you put in a polyfill item, and any wool block, then you can select from any available plushie! Plushies can also be upgraded with Speakers and Squeakers, giving them mob sounds or squeaker sounds, respectively. Plushies can be placed on the ground, where you can select from 3 poses by crouch-clickinng the block, The poses are Sitting, Standing, and Laying. You can also craft a Cardboard Box from Cardboard items, which you can place plushies into for a fourth pose. Placed plushies interact with redstone, providing comparator outputs, and playing their sounds when powered. If you want to add plushies, take a look at the [Examples Directory](https://github.com/Sweet-Berry-Collective/MoreThanAFoxbox/tree/fabric-1.21.8/examples) of our repository. --- [![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/toybox)
